# Main Level 41.0 

### **Description**

Students independently solve multiplication problems involving tables up to 10 and two-digit by one-digit multiplication with larger numbers.

### **Sections**

### **Section A: Multiplication Facts**

Examples

* 9 × 8 \= \_\_\_  
* 7 × 9 \= \_\_\_  
* 10 × 8 \= \_\_\_

### **Section B: Complete the Table**

| ×8 | Answer |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1 × 8 | 8 |
| 2 × 8 | 16 |
| 3 × 8 | \_\_\_ |
| 4 × 8 | 32 |
| 5 × 8 | \_\_\_ |

### **Section C: Two-Digit × One-Digit (Vertical)**

Examples

48 × 7  
36 × 8  
59 × 6
